assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table listing 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18 has '## Code Intelligence' and line 20 states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' with an example on lines 25-29 showing 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31 contains '### Limitations' which appears under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), with content 'No limitations known for either Serena instance.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9 states 'Discovered **2 Serena instances** from the MCP tool listing:' followed by '1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__`' (line 11) and '2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__`' (line 16).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 3-9 document preserved existing content (my-project heading, Documentation, Getting Started). Lines 12-34 document all four sections as newly added: '1. **Repository Registry** (new table)', '2. **Jira Configuration** (new section)', '3. **Code Intelligence** (new section)', '4. **Bug Configuration** (new section)'. Line 42 summarizes: 'Sections added: 1 (Project Configuration with 4 subsections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration)'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5 shows the table header: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' which exactly matches the required columns.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39 contain '## Bug Configuration' with all three fields: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 39-42 confirm: 'User was offered the Security Configuration opt-in prompt (Step 9)', 'User declined to enable security triage for this project', 'No Security Configuration section generated'. changes-log.md line 37 confirms: 'Security Configuration: user declined the opt-in prompt (Step 9) -- section not generated'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section (full file is 40 lines, no such heading exists).
